heading: Supported Regions
body:
| AWS Region     | Location               | Atlas Region     |
| -------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------- |
| ap-southeast-1 | Singapore              | AP\_SOUTHEAST\_1 |
| ap-southeast-2 | Sydney, NSW, Australia | AP\_SOUTHEAST\_2 |
| ap-south-1     | Mumbai, India          | AP\_SOUTH\_1     |
| ap-northeast-1 | Tokyo, Japan           | AP\_NORTHEAST\_1 |
| ap-northeast-2 | Seoul, South Korea     | AP\_NORTHEAST\_2 |
| ap-northeast-3 | Osaka, Japan           | AP\_NORTHEAST\_3 |
